x.name: Deedy Das
x.bio: Partner @MenloVentures. Formerly founding team @glean, @google Search. @cornell CS. Investor @AnthropicAI, @GoodfireAI, @OpenRouter, @WisprFlow, @_inception_ai

tweets.text:
Be careful what you post anonymously. New research shows AI can find who you are solely from your posts.

It's rare to see ~500x research improvements, but they went from mapping <0.1% to 54% of HackerNews profiles to their LinkedIn. 

It's so over, u/throwaway4927. https://t.co/Ep8Gz7muRb

The rhetoric around AI detectors is so stupid. Everyone uses crap products and then says it doesn't work. 

ZeroGPT is so bad it doesn't even get tested. Pangram routinely wins on all third-party evaluations. https://t.co/D2T6pAyabU https://t.co/rGwnLpV25e
